::: {.list-table header-rows="0" aligns="c"}

- - Orden ascendente

- - []{style="background: #082F49; color: #BAE6FD;"} **DEBUG**

- - []{style="background: #022C22; color: #A7F3D0;"} **INFO**

- - []{style="background: #422006; color: #FDE68A;"} **WARN**

- - []{style="background: #450A0A; color: #FCA5A5;"} **ERROR**

- - []{style="background: #2E1065; color: #D8B4FE;"} **FATAL**

:::
